name: Revlum
description: Offerwall monetization platform for games and apps with worldwide surveys, tasks, and CPI offers.

seo.title: Revlum — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Revlum: Offerwall monetization platform for games and apps with worldwide surveys, tasks, and CPI offers.

when_to_use: Offerwall monetization with surveys and CPI offers for mobile games
Rewarded task-based monetization for casual app publishers
Worldwide survey-based user monetization for gaming apps

pros: Diverse offerwall mix with surveys and CPI
cons: Quality of offers inconsistent in Western geos
Not recognized as tier-1 rewarded brand
review.verdict: Workable secondary offerwall for long-tail revenue, not a primary rewarded monetization choice.
review.best_for: Reward apps and tail games seeking emerging-market offerwall fill.
review.not_for: Premium apps prioritizing offer quality and tier-1 advertiser safety.
